title: Accessibility Scan (Universal Validation)

assertions.step: Run axe-core on: dashboard, calendar, customer details, create-reservation, folio, invoice
assertions.expected: Axe scans 6 pages; generates violation report per page
assertions.actual: Axe-core v4.7 ran on all 6 pages; violation reports generated ✓

assertions.step: Fail on serious or critical violations; compare against baseline if available
assertions.expected: No NEW serious/critical violations introduced by this run
assertions.actual: 0 critical violations found; 0 serious violations found; 3 minor (pre-existing) ✓

notes: Phase 2.6: Universal Validation Suite. Accessibility scan via axe-core passed with no critical or serious violations. Minor pre-existing violations not introduced by this change.
